title: Signals endpoint with tier-based filtering
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/signals: queries SignalBus, returns list with all spec fields
Query params: symbol, signal_type, agent, min_confidence, since, until, limit
Free tier: filters to BTC/USD only, adds 1hr delay to timestamp
Free tier: strips confidence, reasoning, source_agent fields
Pro tier: real-time, all symbols, confidence + source_agent shown
Enterprise tier: same as Pro + reasoning field included
Rate limit check before returning data
Usage increment in Redis on each request
